title: Index Helper
description: The Index mod provides detailed information about mobs and blocks in Minecraft. Simply look at any mob or block, and the mod displays useful data about it, helping you better understand and interact with your world.
body:
![Index](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d4009af51f50b4f5eb3a6bbf50b48b063a535bb_0.webp)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The Index mod provides simple information about mobs and blocks in Minecraft. Simply look at any mob or block, and the mod displays useful data about it, helping you better understand and interact with your world.

 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04e4247935ec313be44a832de96ee2bc8e837f76_0.webp)
